_comment: Cloudflare Transform Rules - Modify Response Header configuration for joemattiello.dev. Use this when proxying GitHub Pages through Cloudflare (Migration Option A). Reference: https://developers.cloudflare.com/rules/transform/response-header-modification/
_usage: Cloudflare Dashboard -> [your zone: joemattiello.dev] -> Rules -> Transform Rules -> Modify Response Header -> Create rule. Use 'Custom filter expression' with the expression below, then add each header from 'set_headers' as a separate 'Set static' action.

rule.name: Security headers for joemattiello.dev
rule.description: Adds Mozilla Observatory recommended response headers to all responses

Content-Security-Policy.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://plausible.io https://www.clarity.ms https://*.clarity.ms; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://plausible.io https://*.clarity.ms https://c.clarity.ms; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests

_terraform_equivalent._comment: If you prefer Terraform, this is the same rule via cloudflare_ruleset (phase=http_response_headers_transform):

Content-Security-Policy.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://plausible.io https://www.clarity.ms https://*.clarity.ms; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://plausible.io https://*.clarity.ms https://c.clarity.ms; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests

_api_equivalent._comment: Direct API call (PUT /zones/{zone_id}/rulesets/phases/http_response_headers_transform/entrypoint). Replace {zone_id} with the joemattiello.dev zone id.

Content-Security-Policy.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://plausible.io https://www.clarity.ms https://*.clarity.ms; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; media-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://plausible.io https://*.clarity.ms https://c.clarity.ms; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
